fields.summary: PaymentService pods OOMKilled after v2.14.0 rollout
fields.description: All payment-gateway pods OOMKilled in prod. Root cause: unbounded idempotency cache introduced in v2.14.0.

comments.body: Cherry-picked cache eviction patch (PR #1847), bumped memory limit to 2Gi as a stopgap, rolled out v2.14.1-hotfix.
Confirmed all pods healthy, 0 restarts. Closing.

fields.summary: ReportingDB connection pool exhausted during nightly export job
fields.description: HikariPool-1 timed out acquiring a connection during ExportJobExecutor.runExport. Pool size was too small for the nightly export job's concurrency.

comments.body: Increased HikariCP maximumPoolSize from 10 to 25 and added a queue timeout. Export job re-run succeeded.
